global_motion.reduced_motion: Honor via useReducedMotion(): y=0, duration=0; marquee paused via motion-reduce:animate-none

constraints.tokens_only: Use Bodhi tokens (text-h1..h5, text-mini, text-text-primary/brand/tertiary, bg-surface-*, border-border-*); NO inline hex, NO clamp()
constraints.preserve_hrefs: ProgramCard cta.href and footer external links (IG / YT / newsletter / get-directions) must be preserved from existing programs-grid-section.tsx and site-footer-block.tsx values

spec.purpose: Horizontal marquee strip listing the 8 limbs of yoga between hero and founder quote
props_to_keep: terms (existing prop name; do NOT rename to items)
spec.notes: Existing component already implements the marquee; confirm gap-24 (~96px), py-5 strip height matches Figma 73px band, italic font-heading weight matches Figma. Ensure DEFAULT_TERMS is the 8 limbs in canonical order: Yama, Niyama, Asana, Pranayama, Pratyahara, Dharana, Dhyana, Samadhi. Render the array twice in the track for seamless loop.

motion.notes: Continuous loop. Reduced-motion halts the loop.

acceptance: Renders all 8 limbs in order (Yama to Samadhi) using text-mini italic font-heading on bg-surface-cream
Strip uses border-y border-border-2 and a continuous left-flowing CSS marquee loop
Marquee halts when prefers-reduced-motion is set (motion-reduce:animate-none applied)
No inline hex / no clamp(); only Bodhi tokens used

spec.purpose: Two-column band: founder quote + attribution on left, portrait image on right

props.name: quote
props.default: When a woman is empowered through yoga, her entire family, community, and future generations benefit.

props.name: image
props.default: { src: '/images/founder/acharya-ashok-portrait.jpg', alt: 'Acharya Ashok, founder of Bodhi School of Yoga' }

spec.layout: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 container max-w-[1233px]; right column ~578px image
spec.notes: BREAKING CHANGE to existing API: replace the 3-part split quote (lead/accent/trail) + long paragraph right column with a SINGLE quote string + an Image block on the right. Confirm no other page imports the old shape (founder-quote-section is only consumed by home page per scout).

acceptance: Two-column grid: quote/eyebrow/attribution left, portrait image right (~578px wide on lg)
Eyebrow renders 'Our practice' in text-mini tracking-wider text-text-brand; quote in text-h3/h4 font-heading text-text-primary; attribution in subtext-1 text-text-tertiary
Entrance: eyebrow then quote then attribution stagger fade-in-up with delays 0/0.08/0.16s; image fade-in at 0.1s; triggers whileInView once with house easing [0.22,1,0.36,1]
Honors prefers-reduced-motion (y=0, duration=0); only Bodhi tokens, no hex, no clamp()

spec.purpose: Two-column: lifestyle photo left, heading + intro + 'What We Stand For' bulleted pillars + 'Learn More' text link right

props.name: intro
props.default: Founded in 2014 by Acharya Ashok, Bodhi School of Yoga was created with a simple yet powerful vision: to help people reconnect with themselves through yoga, wellness, and conscious living.

spec.layout: container max-w-[1202px], grid lg:grid-cols-[534px_minmax(0,1fr)] gap-[57px]; image aspect 4/5
spec.notes: Replace subhead with intro, innerHeading with pillarsTitle (or accept both for backwards compat). Replace the filled green CTA box at the bottom with a text-link 'Learn More' + arrow-right icon, NOT a button. Update the 5 pillar strings to the longer copy from decomposition.json.

acceptance: Renders 2-column grid with image left (aspect 4/5) and heading+intro+pillarsTitle+5 pillars+CTA link right
CTA is a text-link 'Learn More' with arrow (not a filled button) using text-text-brand, navigates to /about via next/link
Right-column entrance staggers heading then intro then pillarsTitle then pillars (each pillar 0.08s step) with house easing
Hover on CTA shifts the arrow 2px right and underlines via Tailwind utilities; honors prefers-reduced-motion
Only Bodhi tokens; no inline hex; no clamp()

spec.purpose: Dark full-bleed band with 2 stacked rails ('Yoga Teacher Training Courses' + 'Regular yoga Courses'), each 3 cards + a 'More Courses' link on the right of the rail header

props.name: rails
props.shape: { eyebrow, title, moreLabel, moreHref, cards: Card[] }

spec.layout: section is full-bleed (w-screen) on bg-brand-dark; inner container; each rail header is a flex row (left: eyebrow + title; right: more-courses link); cards in grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6
spec.preserve_hrefs: PRESERVE EXISTING card hrefs in DEFAULT_TTC + DEFAULT_CERT arrays inside this file (/programs/pranayama-nervous-system, /programs/300-hour-yoga-teacher-training-online, /programs/face-yoga-teacher-training, /programs/weight-loss-coach-teacher-training, /programs/bala-yoga-teacher-training, /programs/mat-pilates-teacher-training, /programs/certifications/weight-loss-coach, /programs/certifications/mudra-therapy, /programs/certifications/mat-pilates-instructor). Trim render to first 3 per rail; do not delete the default arrays.
spec.notes: Switch bg from bg-surface-1 to bg-brand-dark; invert text. Rail header changes from centered to flex justify-between. Keep inline TtcCard/CertCard markup but extract the card into T5 (ProgramCard) so both rails share one card. Second rail eyebrow stays 'Teacher Training' per Figma (flagged copy bug).

motion.notes: Eyebrow + title + 'More Courses' fade up together per rail.
Each rail animates independently when its viewport enters.

acceptance: Section is full-bleed on bg-brand-dark; header copy uses text-text-inverse / brand-shade tokens
Each rail header is a flex row: eyebrow + title on the left, 'More Courses' link on the right (rail 0 -> /teacher-courses, rail 1 -> /yoga-courses, both via next/link)
Renders exactly 3 cards per rail in a 3-column grid (md+); existing default card hrefs preserved in DEFAULT_TTC / DEFAULT_CERT arrays (do not delete)
Rail-card row uses parent stagger (0.08s step) with house easing; each rail's whileInView fires independently; only Bodhi tokens; no hex; no clamp()

spec.purpose: Reusable program card used 6x by ProgramsGridSection on the dark band: image top, meta row + title + 'View Program' link below

props.name: cta
props.notes: href preserved from caller; may be '#' for placeholder cards

tokens: bg-surface-cream or bg-card (card surface against brand-dark)
spec.preserve_hrefs: Card href passed by caller MUST be rendered verbatim (do not rewrite '#')
spec.notes: New shared primitive that replaces the inline TtcCard/CertCard markup currently duplicated inside programs-grid-section.tsx. Use next/link when href is non-empty; render anchor with href='#' otherwise (still wired).

actions.notes: Pass through href verbatim; '#' is allowed until product resolves

acceptance: Renders image top (overflow-hidden), small 'Online' mode pill, title, meta row (duration / mode / language), and 'View Program' link
Hovering the card lifts it 2px with the dark-shadow variant AND gently scales the image to 1.03 via group/group-hover Tailwind utilities
View Program link navigates via next/link to cta.href verbatim (preserves '#' placeholder when caller passes it)
No entrance animation defined locally (entrance comes from parent stagger); only Bodhi tokens, no inline hex, no clamp()

spec.purpose: Trust band: 'A Path to Wellness' eyebrow + 'We are recognised across the world' heading, then one rounded surface card containing 6 captioned logos in a 3-col rail with RYS-300 + RYS-200 badges pinned to the right edge without captions

props.name: heading
props.default: We are recognised across the world

props.name: items
props.shape: { logo, alt, caption, variant?: 'caption' | 'badge', omitCaption?: boolean }

spec.layout: stack: header + single rounded card; inside card: main grid (3 cols x 2 rows for the 6 captioned logos) + 2 large circular badges pinned to the right edge
spec.notes: Add an omitCaption (or variant: 'badge') flag per item so RYS-300 / RYS-200 render as larger circular badges without captions, pinned right. Items per decomposition (8 entries; 6 captioned + 2 badges).

motion.notes: Whole rounded card lands as one block; consider RevealOnScroll.
Fade only; no translate (logos shouldn't move).

acceptance: Renders eyebrow + heading + a single rounded card on bg-card containing 6 captioned logos in a 3-col grid and 2 pinned badges (RYS-300 / RYS-200) on the right without captions
Header staggers eyebrow then heading; card fades in as one block; inner logos fade-in only (no translate) at 0.06s step
Honors prefers-reduced-motion (no translates, durations 0)
Only Bodhi tokens; rounded-[2rem] retained for the card; no inline hex; no clamp()

spec.purpose: 3-column grid under 'A Path to Wellness / What our clients say' header

props.name: testimonials
props.shape: { id, quote, authorName, authorMeta, avatarSrc, avatarAlt }

spec.layout: grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6; each card ~457px wide
spec.notes: Existing component already uses TestimonialCard from ui/testimonial-card.tsx. Confirm card width and gap match Figma. Avatar position diff (Figma: bottom; current ui primitive: top) will be addressed by the visual-qa pass: DO NOT mutate ui/testimonial-card.tsx in this task because that primitive is shared with other pages.

acceptance: Renders eyebrow + heading + 3 testimonial cards in a 3-col grid (~457px each, gap 24)
Header staggers eyebrow then heading then row stagger (0.1s step) on the 3 cards via whileInView (once: true, margin -80px)
No hover on cards (testimonials should feel still); honors prefers-reduced-motion
Only Bodhi tokens; no inline hex; no clamp()

spec.purpose: Final CTA on the same dark surface as the footer: 'Begin where you are.' centered eyebrow + heading + body + primary button

props_default_copy.heading: Begin where you are.
props_default_copy.body: Whether you want to teach, heal a specific thing, or simply move and breathe with people once a week

tokens: bg-brand-dark (must match SiteFooter for seamless seam)

Trim default body to the Figma copy (drop the tail 'there is a door at Bodhi for that.'). Confirm theme='dark' is the default used by SiteFooterBlock. The decomposition / interactions spec refers to it as 'FinalCtaSection' but this is the same file: DO NOT create a duplicate.

acceptance: Renders centered eyebrow ('Bodhi'), heading ('Begin where you are.'), trimmed body, and primary button ('Try a class, free' -> /contact via next/link) on bg-brand-dark with text-text-inverse
Background tone matches SiteFooter exactly so the seam between FinalCta and Footer is invisible
Stagger entrance: eyebrow then heading then body then CTA at 0/0.08/0.16/0.24s with house easing; CTA button has hover-lift + press-scale via Tailwind
Honors prefers-reduced-motion; only Bodhi tokens; no inline hex; no clamp()

brand.name: Bodhi
brand.tagline: A school for teachers, a home for seekers. Practice, taught honestly.

links.label: Newsletter
links.href: PRESERVE_EXISTING (/contact from DEFAULT_COLUMNS or '#' if not present; do not invent)

Other consumers (pages that import SiteFooterBlock without an explicit columns prop) must still get the existing 5-col default. Implement by accepting optional columns/brand/legal override props AND keeping the existing default for backwards compatibility. App/page.tsx (T11) will pass the home-page-specific set.

All footer link hover states apply hover-underline-link Tailwind utility (color shift + underline grow); no entrance animation on the footer
External hrefs for Instagram / YouTube / Get directions / Newsletter / Email preserved verbatim from existing DEFAULT_COLUMNS (builder must Read file before editing)

acceptance: @keyframes marquee exists in globals.css with translateX(0) -> translateX(-50%)
If already present, no edit is made (verified by grep before write)

spec.purpose: Update the home page composition: remove ExperienceHarmonyStatsBand + WhatWeDoSection, render the new section order, and pass home-page-specific columns/brand/legal props to SiteFooterBlock
changes: REMOVE the <ExperienceHarmonyStatsBand /> render (drop import if unused elsewhere)
REMOVE the standalone <WhatWeDoSection /> render (it's now inside hero-section.tsx)

ENSURE the render order (top to bottom): <HeroSection /> -> <SanskritMarqueeStrip /> -> <FounderQuoteSection /> -> <WhyBodhiSection /> -> <ProgramsGridSection /> -> <AccreditationsSection items={...} /> -> <TestimonialsSection testimonials={...} /> -> <SiteFooterBlock columns={...} brand={...} legal={...} /> (SiteFooterBlock internally renders ClosingCtaSection above SiteFooter)

PASS home-page-specific SiteFooterBlock props (brand + 3 columns School/Visit/Stay close + legal) matching T9's home_page_columns_spec; PRESERVE the existing external hrefs for Instagram, YouTube, Get directions, Newsletter exactly as defined inside site-footer-block.tsx today (read file to copy URLs verbatim)
KEEP the existing testimonials data prop on page.tsx (copy already matches Figma per decomposition)
KEEP the existing accreditations items prop on page.tsx if present; otherwise pass the 8-item list from decomposition with omitCaption: true on RYS-300 and RYS-200

acceptance: <ExperienceHarmonyStatsBand /> and standalone <WhatWeDoSection /> are no longer rendered on the home page

Section render order matches decomposition: Hero -> SanskritMarquee -> FounderQuote -> WhyBodhi -> ProgramsGrid -> Accreditations -> Testimonials -> SiteFooterBlock (which contains ClosingCtaSection + SiteFooter)

SiteFooterBlock receives the home-page-specific Brand/School/Visit/Stay close props; external hrefs (IG / YT / directions / newsletter) are copied verbatim from the existing site-footer-block.tsx defaults
yarn build / tsc passes with no type errors; no inline hex; no clamp(); only Bodhi tokens used

parallel_waves.rationale: All 10 tasks edit independent files (one section each + one CSS file + one new card primitive). They can run concurrently.
page.tsx wire-up depends on all section changes being applied.

demo_page_skipped_reason: Home page itself IS the demo. visual-qa screenshots / directly; no /demo/<section> route needed.

remove-from-page-tsx (T11). Component file kept on disk; may be reused elsewhere.
